title: Arctic (and Antarctic!) Sea Ice Extent: August 3, 2023
summary: August 3 2023: Over the past week, the sea ice had a decrease , since last week, by a slightly lower rate of 6.21% , from the level on 07/27/2023 of 7.137 M km 2 to 6.694 M km 2 for this week. Plot Compiled by: Howard J. Diamond, PhD; Climate Science Program Manager at NOAA’s Air Resources Laborator...
